title: A 'Chernobyl' Deep Dive With Creator Craig Mazin and Mallory Rubin
format: Sean Fennessey and Mallory Rubin unpack HBO's 'Chernobyl,' then Sean sits down with creator Craig Mazin. A TV episode, so the films are mostly touchstones dropped along the way.

films.title: Good Will Hunting
films.note: Sean's frame for Stellan Skarsgård's Boris, the inverse of his role here: a man with none of the math or science.

films.title: The Death of Stalin
films.note: Armando Iannucci's comedy, cited as the Russian-accent trap 'Chernobyl' sidesteps by casting English actors who don't affect one.

films.title: Wild Rose
films.note: Jessie Buckley (Ludmilla) stars; out later that month. Sean calls her his favorite working actress.

segments.heading: Craig Mazin on 'Chernobyl'
segments.note: The creator on the miniseries format, the accent decision, the science, and the companion podcast. No theatrical films in play.
